reasoning.layer_1_data: FY2025 10-K: rev $2,779.5M (+33%), GAAP op income -$62.1M (margin -2.2%), NI $124.7M (-67% YoY non-op driven), SBC $634.2M (22.8% rev, tripled from 8.4% FY23), LT debt $1,810.7M (doubled YoY), FCF $75M (-77%). Q1 2026: rev $807M (+34%), GAAP op margin 3.6%, Adj EBITDA 25%, ARR $1.493B (+35%), bookings $14.3B (+44%), FCF -$55M. Material weakness disclosed FY2024 10-K Feb 2025, un-remediated 15+ months. Position: 5.40517289 sh, cost basis €1,873.39, current value €1,847 net.
reasoning.layer_2_concept: FCF colapso FY25 (-77% YoY); ROIC 3 metodos todas materialmente negativos vs WACC 12% (spread -11pp persistente). SBC tripled + debt doubled + material weakness = tres senales calidad simultaneas. Moat gov-procurement real pero no insula de regime change cap allocation. Peer set hibrido: defense $120-240, SaaS $550-900. EV framework: HOLD_base €1,832 vs EXIT €1,894 (-3.24%); HOLD_low €1,214 vs EXIT (-35.9%) -> A4 fires.
reasoning.layer_3_thesis: EXIT total. AXON post-pivot growth real pero fundamentals inflexionados adversamente en seis dimensiones quality simultaneas. Pre-position counterfactual REJECTaria entrada; v2 EXIT coincide -> sycophancy gate passed. EV framework decision rule A4 (asymmetric tail) fires robustly: HOLD_low -35.9% vs EXIT en escenario original Y -34.6% bajo correcciones red-team. A3 fires en escenario original pero NO bajo correcciones combined (HOLD_base +5.14% sobre EXIT). EXIT rests on tail asymmetry, not base-case dominance — transparencia explicita en sensitivity table. Realized loss €25.90; 2-month rule activa hasta ~2026-07-14; Q2 2026 (6 Aug) AFTER window close enabling clean v3 re-evaluation si gates pass.

reasoning.layer_1_data: SEC EDGAR XBRL companyfacts MELI a 2026-05-10 (CIK 0001099590, latest 10-K FY2025 cierre 31-dic-2025). Revenue FY2025: $20.3B. Op income margin ~15.7%. CFO FY2025 $12.1B. Capex $1.3B (capex/rev 6.6%). Net debt $5.5B. Precio $1571.64 via Finnhub. Rf 10Y=4.41% FRED DGS10.
reasoning.layer_2_concept: (a) FCF durability: en transicion de cashflow-negativo a positivo; FY2025 FCFF $10.8B, trayectoria mejorando ano a ano. (b) ROIC mediana 5y: 16.6% vs WACC 15.1% — spread +2pp. (c) Moat: ecosystem flywheel marketplace+pagos+logistica+credito; network effects en Brasil (60% rev) son potentes; Mercado Pago genera fintech ARR creciente. Riesgo competitivo: Amazon Brasil acelerando inversion ultimo 3 anos. (d) Leverage: Net Debt/EBITDA ~1.3x — manejable pero menos colchon que un MSFT. (e) Quality flags: F-score 4/9, Altman Z'' 1.9, Beneish M -3.16. (f) Capital allocation: sin dividendos, recompras minimas, reinvirtiendo en logistica/fintech — coherente con growth phase.
reasoning.layer_3_thesis: MercadoLibre es lider regional en e-commerce + fintech Latam con flywheel marketplace-pagos-logistica-credito que ha demostrado crecimiento durable. Tres palancas: (i) Brasil dominante (60% rev) con tasa de penetracion e-commerce todavia <12% (vs 23% US, 33% China) — runway estructural; (ii) Mercado Pago / Mercado Credito acelerando el take rate vs marketplace; (iii) red logistica MEDV+full-fillment-by-MELI cementa cost moat vs entrants. DCF FCFF da $169/sh (-89% vs precio actual $1572). Peer multiples ex-China (AMZN/SE/CPNG fwd P/E mediana 28x): $1761/sh (+12%). Reverse-DCF: precio actual descuenta growth >60% en 5y. Riesgo asimetrico: macro Argentina + Brasil tipo selic + competencia Amazon. Horizonte: 3 anos.

reasoning.layer_1_data: Q1 2026 reported 2026-05-07. Net rev $8.85B (+49% YoY). Op income $611M -> op margin 6.9% (vs Q1 2025 12.9%, Q4 2025 10.1%). EPS $8.23 (missed $8.32). GMV Brasil +38% FX-neutral, Mexico +35%, Argentina +41%. Mercado Pago TPV $87.2B (+55% FX-neutral). Credit portfolio $14.6B (+87%). NIMAL 17.8% (vs 22.7%). NPL 90d+ 8.0%. Mgmt: margin compression intentional (credit cards, free shipping, 1P, CBT); 'no material near-term change'; Q1 take-rate cuts flow Q2 -> additional Q2 headwind. Stock -12.3% on May 8; $1,576.61 on 2026-05-13. Position: 1.740904 shares remaining post 2026-05-12 partial-sell (realized loss EUR 280.45). 2-month rule LIRPF active until 2026-07-11.
reasoning.layer_2_concept: (a) FCF: Q1 op income $611M; if sustained 4Q, FY2026 op income ~$2.4B vs FY2025 ~$3.2B (-25%). FCF conversion weaker due to credit portfolio growth (+87% locks up WC). (b) Capital efficiency: TTM ROIC ~11-12% vs 16.6% 5y median; WACC 15.1% -> spread NEGATIVE. Core structural concern. (c) Moat: marketplace + fintech flywheel INTACT — Brasil GMV +38%, items sold +56%, MP MAU +29%. Amazon Brasil narrative not validated. (d) Leverage: net debt rising; Net Debt/EBITDA ~1.5-1.8x post Q1. (e) Quality scores carry from v2; degradation likely post Q1 10-Q. (f) Capital allocation: intentional reinvestment, but 2026 vintage (credit cards, opex) has different risk profile vs 2019-2020 (logistics capex).
reasoning.layer_3_thesis: MELI Q1 2026 valida CRECIMIENTO (rev +49%, Brasil GMV +38%, MP TPV +55%) pero invalida MARGEN (6.9% vs path v2 12%+). Falsifier #1 a mitad: Q1 lo rompe, Q2 lo confirma con probabilidad alta dado guidance. Falsifiers #2 y #3 INACTIVOS (OVER-cumpliendo must_be_trues v2 sobre top-line). Mgmt frame inversion intencional coherente pero mix (credito al consumo, no logistica) tiene perfil pro-ciclico distinto vs vintage 2019-2020. DCF revisado $372 (-76%), peer $825 (-48%). Reverse-DCF a precio actual exige 48% CAGR 5y — mercado todavia valora v2 scenario. Veredicto: WATCH activo, mantener 1.74 sh hasta Q2 2026 (agosto): (i) Q2 es gate confirmatorio del falsifier, (ii) regla 2 meses LIRPF bloquea recompra antes 2026-07-11. Si Q2 confirma op margin <9%: EXIT completo en septiembre. Si Q2 sorprende >=10%: revisar con confianza renovada.

falsifier_1_op_margin_sub_9_two_q.note: Q1 2026 = 6.9% BREACHES threshold materially. Q4 2025 = 10.1% PASS. Per v2 design, falsifier requires 2 CONSECUTIVE quarters; currently 1 of 2. Q2 2026 (Aug 2026) is confirmation gate. Mgmt guidance ('no material near-term change' + 'take-rate cuts flow Q2') implies elevated probability Q2 also <9%.

falsifier_2_brasil_share_loss_300bp_two_.note: Brasil GMV +38% YoY currency-neutral, OVER-fulfilling v2 must_be_true (>=18%). No share-loss data point in release. Mgmt explicitly addressed Amazon Brasil with positive conversion delta.

falsifier_3_mercado_pago_revenue_sub_15p.note: Mercado Pago revenue +51% USD, TPV +55% FX-neutral. Far above 15% threshold. Separate concern: NIMAL compressed 22.7% -> 17.8% — quality of fintech revenue degrading even as volume grows. Flagged for v4.

reasoning.layer_1_data: Datos consultados: SEC EDGAR XBRL companyfacts a 2026-05-10 (último 10-K filed 2025-07-30, FY2025 cierre 30-jun-2025). Métricas extraídas para FYs [2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025]. Revenue FY2025: $281.7B, OpIncome margin ~45.6%, CFO FY2025 $136.2B, Capex FY2025 $64.6B (capex/rev 22.9%). Net debt: $9.9B. Precio actual $411.00 via Finnhub a 2026-05-10. Rf 10Y = 4.41% via FRED DGS10.
reasoning.layer_2_concept: (a) FCF durability: histórico FCFF 5y trend positivo, conversión CFO>NI consistente. (b) ROIC: mediana 5y = 31.1% vs WACC 9.1% — spread positivo de ~22pp confirma capital eficiente. (c) Moat: software/cloud con switching cost altísimos en Enterprise (Office 365, Azure AD, Dynamics), monopolio efectivo Windows desktop, segundo hyperscaler global (Azure 22-23% share). (d) Leverage profile: Net Debt/EBITDA 0.1x — capacidad de balance abundante. (e) Quality flags: F-score 5/9, Altman Z'' 4.5 (zona segura), Beneish M -2.55 (sin señales de manipulación). (f) Capital allocation: dividend + buyback consistentes, M&A grandes (Activision 2023) integrado sin trauma.
reasoning.layer_3_thesis: Microsoft mantiene posicion de quality compounder con tres pilares: (i) franchise enterprise con switching costs muy elevados (Office 365, Teams, Dynamics) generando ARR resiliente; (ii) Azure como numero 2 cloud hyperscaler con crecimiento 25-30% sostenido y palanca AI via OpenAI; (iii) balance sheet excelente que permite financiar capex AI elevado sin estres de leverage. PERO: valoracion esta full. DCF FCFF estricto da fair value $207/sh (-50% vs precio actual $411). Peer multiples implican $467/sh (+14%) — pero peers tambien estan caros. Reverse-DCF: el precio actual descuenta crecimiento 5y de 27.1% — el mercado paga delivery AI sin descuento. Tesis: HOLD calidad ya en posesion; NO ADD a estos multiples. Riesgo asimetrico: si Azure growth se desacelera o capex AI no entrega margen, multiple compression material. Horizonte: 3 años.
